en.summary: FreeCli 0.0.1 establishes the initial branded release with updated app identity, refreshed logo assets, and a more practical Windows packaging flow.

items.summary: Introduced the FreeCli brand identity and refreshed application logo assets.
Added platform packaging icons for Windows and macOS, including ico and icns outputs.
Updated Windows installer behavior to allow choosing the installation directory.
Resolved packaged Windows startup failure caused by a missing runtime dependency in the updater chain.

zh-CN.summary: FreeCli 0.0.1 完成首个品牌化版本，统一应用身份、更新 Logo 资产，并补齐更适合本地使用的 Windows 打包流程。

items.summary: 引入 FreeCli 品牌标识，并更新应用 Logo 相关资源。
补齐 Windows 与 macOS 打包图标资产，包括 ico 与 icns 格式。
调整 Windows 安装器行为，安装时支持手动选择安装目录。
修复 Windows 安装包因更新链路缺少运行时依赖而导致的启动失败问题。
